title: RemindClockHUD
description: Tired of missing out on things to do because you're too focused on playing? Remind Timer HUD is the solution. Clock, Chronometer, Reminders and Timers are available to keep you focused without missing tasks.
body:
Welcome to Remind Clock HUD.

Tired of missing out on things to do because you're too focused on playing? Remind Timer HUD is the solution. Clock, Chronometer, Reminders and Timers are available to keep you focused without missing tasks.

By these configurations, you can personalize which informations you want to show, and change its colors.

Currently in Beta, only Clock & Chronometer are available. Follow the progression on my discord !

Versions planned : 
Forge (1.18.2 -> latest)
Neoforge (1.20.2 -> latest)
Fabric (1.20 -> latest)

[If you have any bug, question or suggestion, come on the discord! ](https://discord.com/invite/xTqj3ZSeH4)
